rationale: Increasing the homestead exemption reduces total taxable property value. The comptroller's biennial estimate of total taxable value under §48.269(a)(2) must incorporate the new exemption amount, requiring a methodology update but no statutory amendment.
quote: the comptroller shall submit to the legislature an estimate of the total taxable value of all property in the state
_note: Proposed change affects inputs to the comptroller's taxable-value estimate but does not alter the statutory duty or deadline; only the estimation methodology must be updated.
